title: Cuneiform Tablet #0782: Old Akkadian Lexical
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Akkadian period — a lexical document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Akkadian period — a lexical document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Akkadian period. Lexical document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records lexical matters typical of Old Akkadian period administrative or literary practice.
